meaning: n.碎石,卵石,满布石块的山,遍地小石的山的斜坡
examples: Here is the thin gauge sheet steel that used to create the scree profile tool.
There’s nothing difficult, just scree and small rocks—no snow this time of year.
Jonathan made a scree of delight, the first sound he had made since he had left Earth.
He also said that "no-one had any difficulty" while descending the scree slope of the mountain's east ridge.
Amazon is also unveiling AdMash, a Kindle app and Web site were customers can evaluate ads for potential use as Kindle scree-savers.
